Title: MemorySmith.Agent — Action Dispatch & Correlation System
Content:
The action dispatch and correlation system connects the C# planner to the Node.js Mineflayer adapter through a fire-and-forget dispatch model with asynchronous event-driven completion.

## Architecture

AgentBackgroundService.DispatchActionsAsync dequeues ActionData from _queue, assigns a correlationId (Guid), creates a PendingAction(Dispatched) in _correlatedActions, and calls toolCaller.CallWithOutcomeAsync. The tool sends the action via WebSocket to the Node.js adapter. When the adapter completes the action, it emits an event (e.g., blockMined, moveComplete) back to C#. ProcessEventsAsync routes the event to CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool or FailCorrelatedActionByTool.

## Correlation Lifecycle

1. ENQUEUE: ActionData created with optional correlationId (assigned if empty)
2. DISPATCHED: PendingAction(Dispatched) inserted into _correlatedActions via TryAdd
3. IN-FLIGHT: Action sent to Mineflayer via WebSocketBridge.SendActionAsync
4. COMPLETED: Adapter emits event → ProcessEventsAsync routes to CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool(toolName) → CAS TryUpdate transitions Dispatched→Completed
5. FAILED: Adapter emits error → FailCorrelatedActionByTool → CAS transitions Dispatched→Failed
6. TIMED OUT: SweepTimedOutActions finds Dispatched actions older than ActionTimeoutSeconds (30s) → CAS transitions Dispatched→TimedOut

## Synchronization: CAS Loop

_correlatedActions is a ConcurrentDictionary<Guid, PendingAction>. State transitions use TryUpdate with the expected old value:

try
{
    if (_correlatedActions.TryGetValue(correlationId, out var existing)
        && existing.Status == PendingStatus.Dispatched)
    {
        var updated = existing with { Status = PendingStatus.Completed };
        _correlatedActions.TryUpdate(correlationId, updated, existing);
    }
}

This prevents race conditions where a timeout and completion event arrive simultaneously — only one CAS succeeds.

## ActionData Context Bag

ActionData has a Context Dictionary<string, string> that carries:
- correlationId (Guid string)
- dispatchTime (ISO 8601)
- toolName (for event routing back to correlation)
- Additional metadata from planner (e.g., block type, target position)

## Tool Types: Sync vs Fire-and-Forget

- Fire-and-forget tools (mine, move, wander, craft, place): dispatched async, completed by event. _fireAndForgetTools HashSet gates re-dispatch while in-flight.
- Sync tools (GetStatus, SearchMemory, GetPage): dispatched synchronously, completed immediately in CallWithOutcomeAsync.

## PendingAction Record (Agent.Core/Models/PendingAction.cs)

Fields: CorrelationId (Guid), ToolName (string), Status (PendingStatus enum: Dispatched/Completed/Failed/TimedOut), DispatchedAt (DateTimeOffset), ActionData.

## Key Code Locations

- DispatchActionsAsync: AgentBackgroundService.cs ~line 1040-1180
- _correlatedActions TryAdd: ~line 1090
- CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool: ~line 1530
- FailCorrelatedActionByTool: ~line 1550
- TransitionCorrelatedAction: ~line 1560
- SweepTimedOutActions: ~line 1507
- _fireAndForgetTools: ~line 80 (static field)
- PendingAction record: Agent.Core/Models/PendingAction.cs
